system.description:
When you wish to acquire or sell a commonly available item, you can. When you seek to aquire or sell a special item, roll +Prosperity and subtract the item's Value. In winter, you have disadvantage. On a 10+, you can get it or sell it for a fair price; on a 7-9, when you're trying to buy, the GM picks 1:

  • You can get it, but it'll cost more than usual
  • ____ has it, but they aren't keen to give it up.
  • You can get get something close, but not quite right

On a 7-9 when you're looking to sell, you can sell it now but you won't get its full worth.

On a 6- either way don't mark XP. If you want to aquire/sell it, you'll need to travel to ____ or wait until next season.

For unique or truly exceptional items, don't Trade & Barter. Either get with the GM and Make a Plan or wait for a trade opportunity when Seasons Change.

success.value: You can get it or sell it for a fair price.

partial.value:
When you're trying to buy, the GM picks 1:
  • You can get it, but it'll cost more than usual
  • ____ has it, but they aren't keen to give it up.
  • You can get get something close, but not quite right
On a 7-9 when you're looking to sell, you can sell it now but you won't get its full worth.

failure.value: Don't mark XP. If you want to aquire/sell it, you'll need to travel to ____ or wait until next season.
